personality: 7 Dark-First Utility with 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A high-performance, premium AI command center built for speed, orchestration, and executive control.

spacing.rule: Generous intentional padding around metrics and cards to separate dense data points. Use consistent gaps for grids and stacks.

do's: Use glass effect on sticky bottom tab bar
Apply glass blur to hero/dashboard featured metric cards
Use glass for floating action buttons or approval bottom sheets
Pair blur with dark tinted base (≥75% opacity) to maintain high contrast
dont's: Never blur dense task list items or form inputs
Do not use glass for text containers or standard buttons

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: A live operational overview of company performance, AI agent metrics, and system status.

states.loading: Central high-tech spinner with blurred background
states.empty: Illustration of idle command center, prompt to launch a goal
states.error: Red error text over surfaceSecondary block, Retry connection button

screens.layout: Hero section uses a wide glass-blurred card overlaying a subtle textured image. Key KPI metrics (Total Agents, Projects) stack vertically or in a 2-col wrap grid. Recent activity feed sits below with tight spacing.

screens.name: CEO Orchestration
screens.purpose: Central command to input high-level objectives and observe AI breakdown, workflow execution, and final summary.

states.loading: Skeleton graph nodes and glowing lines indicating processing
states.empty: Large text input for business objective, floating action button to 'Synthesize Plan'
states.error: Error block indicating agent breakdown failure, Edit Objective button

screens.layout: Top half is a focused input area. Upon submission, it collapses to a sticky header and reveals a multi-step vertical progress timeline (the 'workflow graph') showing which agent is handling which subtask. Progress bars and status badges update dynamically.

screens.name: Agent Cards
screens.purpose: Grid view of all AI employees displaying their real-time status, performance score, and current task.

states.loading: Skeleton cards with pulsating avatar slots
states.empty: No agents active, prompt to initialize workforce
states.error: Agent registry failed to load, reload button

screens.layout: 2-column wrapped grid. Each card features an abstract 3D shape as the agent's avatar, pulse indicator (active/idle), name, role, and a condensed current task label.

screens.name: Task System
screens.purpose: Detailed breakdown of all active, pending, and completed tasks across departments with dependencies.

states.empty: Empty state illustration with text 'All tasks complete'
states.error: Error fetching tasks, tap to retry

screens.layout: Vertical list layout with sticky filter/segment controls (Pending | Running | Completed). Each list row includes priority badge, agent assignee, task name, and a progress bar.

screens.name: Approval Queue
screens.purpose: Dedicated space for reviewing and approving sensitive actions flagged by AI agents.
screens.layout: Full-width cards detailing the proposed action, impact, and requesting agent. Large side-by-side CTA buttons (Approve/Reject) or a swipe-to-approve gesture using Reanimated.

agent_avatar_1.alt: Luminous 3D geometric shape for Marketing agent avatar

agent_avatar_2.alt: Abstract wavy lines for Developer agent avatar

agent_avatar_3.alt: Abstract metallic spiral for Finance agent avatar

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility guidelines. Avoid pure black backgrounds; stick to the surface hex values provided.
Implement glassmorphism selectively on hero cards and floating elements using expo-blur. Always place a dark tint under the blur for text readability.
Do NOT use any blues, purples, or indigo hues. The accent is purely Ember/Signal Orange (#FF4400) alongside success/warning colors.
For the CEO orchestration screen, ensure the workflow graph/timeline feels highly mechanical and precise with glowing progress indicators.
Implement tactile haptics on status toggles, approval buttons, and tab switches.
Use Phosphor icons with consistent weights. No emojis anywhere.
Ensure the Task System list has high information density but remains highly scannable, grouping priority and status clearly.
Ensure all text layered over the dashboard hero background image uses a linear-gradient scrim (top to bottom) so it remains legible.
Agent cards should use the abstract 3D images provided for avatars, not generic initials, to maintain the premium AI OS feel.
